properties.SQL select query:
SELECT
    s.id AS fact_id,
    s.sale_date::DATE AS sale_date,
    NULL AS classroom,
    NULL AS semestr,
    
    -- Бизнес-ключи (ID из OLTP)
    s.client_id AS client_id,
    s.car_id AS car_id,
	c.vin_code AS car_vin,
    s.employee_id AS employee_id,
    NULL AS group_id,
    NULL AS specialization_id,
    
    -- Метрики
    s.final_price AS final_price,
    c.price AS base_price,
    
    -- Суррогатные ключи (изначально 0)
    0 AS client_key,
    0 AS demography_key,
    0 AS car_key,
    0 AS employee_key,
    0 AS date_key,
    
    false AS myflag,
    'oltp' AS type
    
FROM public.sales s
INNER JOIN public.cars c ON s.car_id = c.id
WHERE s.sale_date IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY s.sale_date

SELECT
    NULL::INTEGER AS fact_id,
    NULL::DATE AS sale_date,
    NULL::NUMERIC AS final_price,
    NULL::NUMERIC AS base_price,
    
    NULL::INTEGER AS client_id,
    NULL::INTEGER AS car_id,
    NULL::VARCHAR AS car_vin,
    employee_alternate_key AS employee_id,
    
    NULL::INTEGER AS client_key,
    NULL::INTEGER AS demography_key,
    0 AS car_key,
    key_employee AS employee_key,
    0 AS date_key,
    
    true AS myflag,
    'dimdwh_employee' AS type
    
FROM dw.dim_employee
ORDER BY employee_alternate_key

properties.sql:
SELECT
    a.fact_id,
    a.sale_date,
    a.final_price,
    a.base_price,
    a.client_id,
    a.car_id,
    a.car_vin,
    a.employee_id,
    a.client_key,
    COALESCE(b.demography_key, a.demography_key, 0) AS demography_key,
    0 AS car_key,
    0 AS employee_key,
    0 AS date_key,
    a.myflag,
    'oltp' AS type
FROM FLOWFILE a
LEFT JOIN FLOWFILE b 
    ON a.client_id = b.client_id 
    AND b.type = 'dimdwh_demography'
WHERE a.type = 'oltp'

SELECT
    a.fact_id,
    a.sale_date,
    a.final_price,
    a.base_price,
    a.client_id,
    a.car_id,
    a.car_vin,
    a.employee_id,
    a.client_key,
    a.demography_key,
    a.car_key,
    COALESCE(b.employee_key, 0) AS employee_key,
    a.date_key,
    a.myflag,
    'oltp' AS type
FROM FLOWFILE a
LEFT JOIN FLOWFILE b ON a.employee_id = b.employee_id AND b.type = 'dimdwh_employee'
WHERE a.type = 'oltp'

SELECT
    a.fact_id,
    a.sale_date,
    a.final_price,
    a.base_price,
    a.client_id,
    a.car_id,
    a.car_vin,
    a.employee_id,
    COALESCE(b.client_key, 0) AS client_key,
    0 AS demography_key,
    0 AS car_key,
    0 AS employee_key,
    0 AS date_key,
    a.myflag,
    'oltp' AS type
FROM FLOWFILE a
LEFT JOIN FLOWFILE b 
    ON a.client_id = b.client_id 
    AND b.type = 'dimdwh'
WHERE a.type = 'oltp'

SELECT
    a.fact_id,
    a.sale_date,
    a.final_price,
    a.base_price,
    a.client_id,
    a.car_id,
    a.car_vin,
    a.employee_id,
    a.client_key,
    a.demography_key,
    COALESCE(b.car_key, 0) AS car_key,
    0 AS employee_key,
    0 AS date_key,
    a.myflag,
    'oltp' AS type
FROM FLOWFILE a
LEFT JOIN FLOWFILE b 
    ON a.car_vin = b.car_vin 
    AND b.type = 'dimdwh_car'
WHERE a.type = 'oltp'

properties.SQL select query:
SELECT 
    key_client,
    client_alternate_key,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    phone,
    email,
    address,
    location_key,
    demography_key,
    effective_date,
    expiration_date,
    is_current,
    'dwh' as type
FROM dw.dim_client
WHERE is_current = true

properties.UniqueRows:
SELECT 
    oltp.client_alternate_key,
    oltp.first_name,
    oltp.last_name,
    oltp.phone,
    oltp.email,
    oltp.address,
	NULL AS location_key,
    NULL AS demography_key,
    CAST(CURRENT_DATE AS VARCHAR) AS effective_date,  
    '2999-12-31' AS expiration_date,
    TRUE AS is_current
FROM FLOWFILE oltp
LEFT JOIN FLOWFILE dwh ON oltp.client_alternate_key = dwh.client_alternate_key 
    AND dwh.type = 'dwh' 
    AND dwh.is_current = TRUE
WHERE oltp.type = 'oltp'
  AND dwh.client_alternate_key IS NULL
properties.ChangedRows:
SELECT 
    oltp.client_alternate_key,
    oltp.first_name,
    oltp.last_name,
    oltp.phone,
    oltp.email,
    oltp.address,
	NULL AS location_key,
    NULL AS demography_key,
    CAST(CURRENT_DATE AS VARCHAR) AS effective_date,  
    '2999-12-31' AS expiration_date,
    TRUE AS is_current
FROM FLOWFILE oltp
INNER JOIN FLOWFILE dwh ON oltp.client_alternate_key = dwh.client_alternate_key
WHERE oltp.type = 'oltp'
  AND dwh.type = 'dwh'
  AND dwh.is_current = TRUE
  AND (oltp.first_name <> dwh.first_name 
    OR oltp.last_name <> dwh.last_name 
    OR oltp.phone <> dwh.phone 
    OR oltp.email <> dwh.email 
    OR oltp.address <> dwh.address)
properties.OldRows:
SELECT 
    dwh.key_client,
    dwh.client_alternate_key,
    dwh.first_name,
	dwh.last_name,
	dwh.phone,
	dwh.email,
    dwh.address,
	dwh.location_key,
	dwh.demography_key,
	dwh.effective_date,
	dwh.expiration_date,
    FALSE AS is_current
FROM FLOWFILE dwh
INNER JOIN FLOWFILE oltp ON dwh.client_alternate_key = oltp.client_alternate_key
WHERE dwh.type = 'dwh'
  AND oltp.type = 'oltp'
  AND dwh.is_current = TRUE
  AND (dwh.first_name <> oltp.first_name 
    OR dwh.last_name <> oltp.last_name 
    OR dwh.phone <> oltp.phone 
    OR dwh.email <> oltp.email 
    OR dwh.address <> oltp.address)

properties.SQL select query:
SELECT 
    id AS client_alternate_key,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    phone,
    email,
    address,
    NULL::INTEGER AS location_key,
    NULL::INTEGER AS demography_key,
    CURRENT_DATE::TEXT AS effective_date,  
    '2999-12-31'::TEXT AS expiration_date,  
    TRUE AS is_current
FROM public.clients;

properties.sql:
SELECT
    a.fact_id,
    a.sale_date,
    a.final_price,
    a.base_price,
    a.client_id,
    a.car_id,
    a.car_vin,
    a.employee_id,
    a.client_key,
    a.demography_key,
    a.car_key,
    a.employee_key,
    COALESCE(b.date_key, 0) AS date_key,
    a.myflag,
    'oltp' AS type
FROM FLOWFILE a
LEFT JOIN FLOWFILE b ON a.sale_date = b.sale_date AND b.type = 'dimdwh_date'
WHERE a.type = 'oltp'

properties.SQL select query:
SELECT
    NULL::INTEGER AS fact_id,
    NULL::DATE AS sale_date,
    NULL::NUMERIC AS final_price,
    NULL::NUMERIC AS base_price,
    
    dc.client_alternate_key AS client_id,
    
    NULL::INTEGER AS car_id,
    NULL::INTEGER AS employee_id,
    NULL::INTEGER AS client_key,
    
    dcd.key_demography AS demography_key,
    
    0 AS car_key,
    0 AS employee_key,
    0 AS date_key,
    
    true AS myflag,
    'dimdwh_demography' AS type
    
FROM dw.dim_client_demography dcd
JOIN dw.dim_client dc ON dcd.key_demography = dc.demography_key
WHERE dc.is_current = TRUE
ORDER BY dc.client_alternate_key

SELECT
    NULL::INTEGER AS fact_id,
    NULL::DATE AS sale_date,
    NULL::VARCHAR AS classroom,
    NULL::INTEGER AS semestr,
    
    -- Бизнес-ключ для JOIN
    client_alternate_key AS client_id,
    
    NULL::INTEGER AS car_id,
    NULL::VARCHAR AS car_vin,
    NULL::INTEGER AS employee_id,
    NULL::INTEGER AS group_id,
    NULL::INTEGER AS specialization_id,
    
    NULL::NUMERIC AS final_price,
    NULL::NUMERIC AS base_price,
    
    -- Суррогатные ключи
    key_client AS client_key,
    demography_key,
    0 AS car_key,
    0 AS employee_key,
    0 AS date_key,
    
    true AS myflag,
    'dimdwh' AS type
    
FROM dw.dim_client
WHERE is_current = true
ORDER BY client_alternate_key

SELECT
    NULL::INTEGER AS fact_id,
    full_date AS sale_date,
    NULL::NUMERIC AS final_price,
    NULL::NUMERIC AS base_price,
    
    NULL::INTEGER AS client_id,
    NULL::INTEGER AS car_id,
    NULL::VARCHAR AS car_vin,
    NULL::INTEGER AS employee_id,
    
    NULL::INTEGER AS client_key,
    NULL::INTEGER AS demography_key,
    0 AS car_key,
    0 AS employee_key,
    key_date AS date_key,
    
    true AS myflag,
    'dimdwh_date' AS type
    
FROM dw.dim_date
ORDER BY full_date

SELECT
    NULL::INTEGER AS fact_id,
    NULL::DATE AS sale_date,
    NULL::NUMERIC AS final_price,
    NULL::NUMERIC AS base_price,
    
    NULL::INTEGER AS client_id,
    NULL::INTEGER AS car_id,
    car_alternate_key AS car_vin,
    NULL::INTEGER AS employee_id,
    
    NULL::INTEGER AS client_key,
    NULL::INTEGER AS demography_key,
    key_car AS car_key,
    0 AS employee_key,
    0 AS date_key,
    
    true AS myflag,
    'dimdwh_car' AS type
    
FROM dw.dim_car
ORDER BY car_alternate_key

SELECT 	
	NULL AS key_client,
    id AS client_alternate_key,
    first_name,
    last_name,
    phone,
    email,
    address,
    NULL AS location_key,
    NULL AS demography_key,
    NULL AS effective_date,
    NULL AS expiration_date,
    false AS is_current,
    'oltp' as type
FROM public.clients
